description: Senior frontend engineer and UX design lead at a software consulting firm, working across client engagements and internal product proposals in the media and broadcasting industry.

engagements.title: Senior Frontend Engineer, Global Media & Entertainment Company — 2023 — Present
engagements.description: Suite of web-based applications supporting the ad sales division of one of the world's largest entertainment and broadcasting companies.
bullets: Built an invoice creation and management application for the billing department, streamlining the end-to-end invoicing workflow.
Developed an audience impression delivery tool enabling ad sales teams to model and forecast how many ad impressions NBC can deliver across different audience segments.
Currently building an ad sales order management platform to centralize and manage the full lifecycle of advertising orders.

engagements.title: UX Design Lead, Broadcast Control Room Management — Internal Proposal — 2025
engagements.description: Designed a web-based application for managing digital control room boards used in live broadcasting operations. The proposal was adopted and evolved into a multi-year client engagement with a major U.S. broadcast television network.
bullets: Led UX design and prototyping for an internal proposal targeting broadcast operations teams.
Produced high-fidelity interactive Figma mockups covering real-time control room board management, scheduling, and status tracking.
Proposal was greenlit and became the foundation for a long-term engagement with one of the largest broadcast television networks in the United States.

engagements.title: UX Design Lead, Network Asset Management CMS — Internal Proposal — 2024
engagements.description: Designed a content management system enabling sister networks within a large media conglomerate to share and manage creative assets across properties.
bullets: Architected UX flows and produced detailed Figma mockups for a cross-network digital asset management platform.
Designed features for asset tagging, access controls, and cross-property sharing workflows tailored to broadcast media teams.
Delivered internal proposal documentation including annotated wireframes and an interactive prototype.

description: Active in all aspects of the software development cycle, and more, including - project management and planning, and interviewing developer candidates. As a consultant, I have been involved in a variety of projects and teams. Below are some of the more long-term projects I have been a core member of while at Kogent Systems.

engagements.title: Lead Engineer, Order Management System - Dec. 2022 - Mar. 2023
engagements.description: Web-based application for managing custom built warehouse shelving orders — from quoting to production, and freight shipping.
bullets: Managing team of 6 engineers in developing user story tracks
Created cohesive design system and interactive UI mockups using Figma
Developed and coordinated creation of detailed functional specifications documentation
Architected application's front and backend systems

techStack.name: AWS
techStack.description: Cognito, S3, Code Deploy, Amplify, SES

engagements.title: Front-End Team Lead, Open Freight Marketplace (Remote) — Jan. 2020 - Nov. 2022
engagements.description: Web-based, consumer-facing, open marketplace for freight shipping consisting of multiple applications and private component libraries.
bullets: Led a team of 8 engineers
Drafted software requirements and managed design and testing processes.
Defined and continuously improved software development best practices.
Spearheaded transition to use of NGRX, TailwindCSS, Material UI, Prettier, and SwaggerUI libraries which led to substantially more robust, cleaner, and developer friendly codebase.
Extensive mentoring of junior developers through paired programming and pull-requests.

engagements.title: Engineer, Telecommunications CRM (2016-2020)
engagements.description: Web-based telecommunications CRM, managing customers and their accounts, along with a technician portal for on-site maintenance work with offline capabilities.
bullets: From project kickoff to completion, architected, designed, and implemented and managed front-end and helped to develop REST APIs.
Designed and implemented an offline HTTP Request manager that allowed for the application to be used without internet connectivity and then once connected re-sync data.
Trained clients' developers in Sencha EXT JS, PHP, and GIT, through presentations, documentation, and paired programming.

engagements.title: Engineer, Mobile Delivery Application (2019)
engagements.description: Android application for delivery drivers, allowing for the digitizing of processes traditionally requiring large amount of paperwork - including order acceptance, creation, accident reporting, bar code scanning, and delivery route mapping.
bullets: Helped to gather requirements, architect, design, and implement all aspects of the front-end and PHP APIs.
Demo'd and worked with clients and users to tailor application to their needs.
